name: Silymarin
description: Reference drug from thesis — 93% kidney protection

name: Quercetin
description: Flavonoid with strong antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity

name: Kaempferol
description: Flavonoid found in many plants including A. conyzoides literature

name: Curcumin
description: Turmeric polyphenol with dual antioxidant and anti-inflammatory mechanisms

name: Aristolochic Acid I
description: Herbal nephrotoxin — causes Balkan nephropathy and Chinese herb nephropathy

name: Cyclosporine
description: Calcineurin inhibitor immunosuppressant — nephrotoxic at therapeutic doses
